---
title: "Xiaoting Li"
subtitle: "Visiting Student, 2022–2023"
image: /images/portraits/xiaoting-li.jpg
role: alumni
sort_key: 2023
details: "Visiting Student 2022–2023"
aliases: ["Xiaoting Li", "X. Li", "X Li"]
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:xl688@cornell.edu"
    - icon: record-circle
      text: ORCID
      href: "https://orcid.org/0000-0003-1211-9132"
---

I am interested in work that integrates different spatial and temporal scales to
understand vegetation phenology-environment interactions. My current research
focuses on phenological sensitivity inference with predictive modeling in alpine
grasslands on the Tibetan Plateau.
